notes:
What's new in 1.3.2:
- Adds elapsed request timing to detailed diagnostics logs for OAuth, partition discovery, settings reads, log-list refreshes, and log-content fetches.
- Adds connection and log-refresh Duration-ms fields to the always-on app log so hosted-instance performance issues can be triaged from normal support logs.
- Changes connection logging into a numbered five-step workflow from Connection started through Connection ready, including OAuth token source, partition loading, active partition selection, Transaction Dump status, and initial log-list loading.
- Keeps the 1.3.1 logging model intact: single-line normal app events stay pipe-aligned and detailed HTTP diagnostics remain opt-in.

Also new in 1.3.1 (if upgrading from 1.3.0 or earlier):
- Adds an always-on high-level app log at %LOCALAPPDATA%\LogLens\logs\app.log for lifecycle, connection, log-list refresh, and update workflow events.
- Normal app log entries are single-line, fixed-width pipe aligned, redacted, and include explicit outcomes such as current, needs update, success, and error.
